The '''siege of Koru Neimoidia'''<ref name="Labyrinth">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref> took place in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] devastated [[Koru Neimoidia/Legends|Koru Neimoidia]] as part of an offensive against the last [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] strongholds in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], forcing the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] leadership to take refuge on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]].

{{Battle-stub}}
